name: sqlc queries for routes + segments
description: Extend the sqlc query layer with additional queries needed by the route and segment APIs.
acceptance_criteria: sql/queries/ has extended route queries: list with pagination, get by full name, count by device
sql/queries/ has extended segment queries: batch status update, list with file status, get by route and number
sqlc generate produces updated code in internal/db/ without errors
Queries use appropriate indexes and avoid N+1 patterns
go build and go vet pass cleanly
